title: Synthwave Retro 80s
summary: Driving 110 BPM synthwave with gated snare, soaring leads, and chrome-and-pink mood.
prompt: A driving synthwave instrumental at 110 BPM. Gated reverb snare and punchy 808 kick, pulsing analog bass synth, soaring lead sawtooth synth melody, glittering FM piano chords, sweeping pad in the background. Vintage 1985 sci-fi-soundtrack vibe  -  neon lights, midnight highways, chrome and pink sunsets.
